query: SELECT id, user_id, university, major, project_name, professor_name, match_score, createdAt FROM project_matches ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT id, user_id, university, major, project_name, professor_name, match_score, createdAt FROM project_matches ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
